sectiondef.header: Register offsets for the CAN. Each register is 32 bits.

briefdescription.para: TX High Priority Buf Data Word 2.

sectiondef.header: Software Reset Register (SRR) Bit Definitions and Masks
Mode Select Register (MSR) Bit Definitions and Masks
Baud Rate Prescaler register (BRPR) Bit Definitions and Masks
Bit Timing Register (BTR) Bit Definitions and Masks
Error Counter Register (ECR) Bit Definitions and Masks
Error Status Register (ESR) Bit Definitions and Masks
Status Register (SR) Bit Definitions and Masks
Interrupt Status/Enable/Clear Register Bit Definitions and Masks
CAN Timestamp Control Register (TCR) Bit Definitions and Masks
CAN Watermark Register (WIR) Bit Definitions and Masks
CAN Frame Identifier (TX High Priority Buffer/TX/RX/Acceptance Filter
CAN Frame Data Length Code (TX High Priority Buffer/TX/RX)
CAN Frame Data Word 1 (TX High Priority Buffer/TX/RX)
CAN Frame Data Word 2 (TX High Priority Buffer/TX/RX)
Acceptance Filter Register (AFR) Bit Definitions and Masks

briefdescription.para: Maximum CAN frame length in bytes.
TX High Priority Buf Data Word 2.
This macro reads the given register.

parameterdescription.para: is the base address of the device.
is the register offset to be read.

briefdescription.para: This macro writes the given register.

parameterdescription.para: is the base address of the device.
is the register offset to be written.
is the 32-bit value to write to the register.

briefdescription.para: This function resets the CAN device.

detaileddescription.para: Calling this function resets the device immediately, and any pending transmission or reception is terminated at once. Both Object Layer and Transfer Layer are reset. This function does not reset the Physical Layer. All registers are reset to the default values, and no previous status will be restored. TX FIFO, RX FIFO and TX High Priority Buffer are also reset.
The CAN device will be in Configuration Mode immediately after this function returns.

parameterdescription.para: is the baseaddress of the interface.
